The 60:40 ratio for wages and materia! costs should be maintained for all works being taken up by Gram Panchayat at Gram Panchayat level and for works being taken up by al I other agencies the same shal I be maintained at the Block or Intermediate Panchayat level". [F.No. J-11013/1/2011 -MGNREG A-I (ft. VII)] D. K. JAIN, Jt.
